newsItems.title: Cinema venues enhancement plan 2024 – Line D (4 June 2026)
newsItems.context: Directorial Decree rep. 1491 publishes grants for the structural and technological renovation and upgrade of cinema venues (intervention Line D), for cinema operators.

newsItems.title: Tax Credit Videogames – 29 May 2026 Decree approving final applications
newsItems.context: Directorial Decree rep. 1479 publishes the outcome of the investigation on final (consuntivo) tax credit applications for Italian-nationality videogame productions. Automatic recognition for admitted projects; no individual PEC notifications.

newsItems.title: Final Italian Nationality for Videogames – 29 May 2026 Decree
newsItems.context: D.D. rep. 1480: publication of final Italian nationality for videogames. Equivalent to recognition; check the list in the decree.

newsItems.title: Tax Credit – Decrees of 29 May 2026 for recognition of tax credits and cultural eligibility
newsItems.context: With the directorial decrees of 29 May 2026, the results of the investigations on the eligibility of preliminary applications for tax credits for cinematographic production, TV/web, documentaries and foreign executive productions have been published.

newsItems.title: Tax credit for the enhancement of the cinematographic offer – Decree of 29 May 2026
newsItems.context: The directorial decree of 29 May 2026 publishes the results of the investigations on applications for tax credits relating to the operating costs of cinemas.

newsItems.title: Italy – Baltic States Development Award VIII edition: results and full ranking
newsItems.context: Full ranking published for majority-Italian projects submitted to the 8th edition of the co-development award with Baltic States.

newsItems.title: Selective Contributions 2025 – Full ranking published for Development Session I
newsItems.context: D.D. 20 May 2026 rep. 1267. Complete rankings for development projects submitted in the first 2025 session.

newsItems.title: Selective Contributions 2025 – Screenwriting Session I and Animation/Identity Production rankings
newsItems.context: Rankings published for 2025 Screenwriting I session and 2024 Animation/Italian Identity Production sessions (Art. 26 Law 220/2016).

newsItems.title: Call for Selective Contributions – Year 2026
newsItems.context: D.D. 15 May 2026 rep. 1238. €1M for screenwriting, €2M for development, €32.7M for production (with dedicated quotas for young authors, documentaries, animation and cultural identity projects).

newsItems.title: Tax Credit for Investment Attraction – 2026 Session Opened
newsItems.context: D.D. 19 May 2026 rep. 1244. Terms and procedures for preliminary and final applications for 2026 regarding the tax credit for attracting cinematographic and audiovisual investments to Italy.

newsItems.title: Tax Credit – Decrees on tax credit recognition and cultural eligibility (April 2026)
newsItems.context: Results of the preliminary assessment for cinematographic and TV/web production, documentaries, short films and foreign executive productions.

newsItems.title: Italy-France 2026 Co-Development and Co-Production Call
newsItems.context: Funding for Franco-Italian co-development and co-production projects (feature films and audiovisual series). €1M total allocation (€500k per session).

articles.title: Tax Credit for Cinematographic and Audiovisual Production
articles.summary: 40% (or variable rates) tax credit on eligible expenditure for Italian nationality works or co-productions. Cultural eligibility requirements, caps and procedures via the DGCOL platform.
keyPoints: Base rate up to 40% for feature films and series
Mandatory cultural eligibility requirement
Eligible costs: personnel, services, post-production in Italy
Preliminary and final applications via DGCOL platform
Legal basis: art. 15 Law 220/2016; Min. Decree 10 July 2024 no. 225 (as amended by Min. Decree 22 April 2025 no. 141)

articles.title: Tax Credit for Videogame Production (2026)
articles.summary: Dedicated incentive for Italian-nationality videogame works. Specific procedures, dedicated nationality test and recognition on development/production expenditure incurred in Italy.
keyPoints: Final recognition on admitted applications (D.D. 29/5 rep. 1479)
Separate final Italian nationality decree (D.D. rep. 1480)
Eligible costs: development, Italian team, local services
Applications via DGCOL; final (consuntivo) investigation
articles.errorsToAvoid: Failure to separate core costs from marketing/publishing; insufficient Italian IP for the nationality test.

articles.title: Tax Credit for Attracting Foreign Investment
articles.summary: Specific incentive for foreign productions shooting in Italy or using Italian services. Attractive rates for executive production and capital attraction.
keyPoints: Credit for foreign productions meeting minimum Italian spend
Simplified procedures for Italian executive producers
Annual sessions with published deadlines in dedicated notices

articles.title: Selective Contributions for Screenwriting, Development and Production
articles.summary: Annual calls under Art. 26 of Law 220/2016. Non-repayable grants for artistically and culturally valuable projects. Separate sessions for writing, development and production.
keyPoints: 2026 allocations: €1M writing, €2M development, >€32.7M production
Reserved quotas for young authors, documentaries, animation, cultural identity
Assessment based on artistic quality, feasibility and distribution plan
Implementing rules: Min. Decree 8 October 2024 rep. 345 (art. 26 Law 220/2016)

articles.title: International Co-productions and Bilateral Agreements
articles.summary: Agreements with France and other countries for co-development and co-production. Access to cross-funding and multi-nationality recognition.
keyPoints: Active Italy-France 2026 call with dedicated sessions
Points for minority and majority co-productions
Integration with Creative Europe MEDIA programmes

articles.title: DGCOL Platform: how to submit Tax Credit and contribution applications
articles.summary: Practical guide to completing and submitting preliminary/final applications on the MiC DGCOL platform. Documentary requirements and timing.
keyPoints: Access via SPID/CIE for the legal representative
Upload contracts, budget, production plan, materials
Peremptory deadlines: preliminary before significant qualified expenditure
All communications and integrations handled online
articles.errorsToAvoid: Uploading non-compliant files or failing to list all 'qualified' expenditure on Italian territory.

articles.title: Common errors in cultural eligibility and nationality (2026)
articles.summary: Summary of the most frequent reasons for rejection or requests for integration in the 2026 decrees, with practical suggestions based on practice.
keyPoints: Insufficient score in the cultural test (table annexed to the DM)
Failure to demonstrate prevailing Italian creative contribution
Incomplete or outdated IP/authorship documentation
Budget and distribution plan inconsistent with the declared work
articles.errorsToAvoid: Underestimating the 'Italian cultural identity' or 'artistic quality' component for reserved quotas.

articles.title: Cumulability of Tax Credit, selective contributions and regional incentives
articles.summary: Cumulation rules between national measures (Tax Credit + Art.26), bilateral agreements, Creative Europe MEDIA and regional Film Commission incentives. Limits and cautions.
keyPoints: Tax Credit generally cumulable with selective contributions (within caps)
Regional incentives (Lombardy, Lazio, Puglia, etc.) often stackable
Attention to 'State aid' rules and ceilings per undertaking/production unit
Separate reporting obligation for each measure
articles.errorsToAvoid: Declaring the same expenditure under multiple measures without authorisation or double counting in reporting.

articles.title: Tax Credit Reform and Corrective Decrees (2025-2026)
articles.summary: Corrective and implementing decrees that redefined rates, requirements and procedures after the reform. Production tax credit: Min. Decree 10 July 2024 no. 225, amended by the corrective Min. Decree 22 April 2025 no. 141 (art. 15 Law 220/2016). Constant monitoring of sessions and operating instructions.
keyPoints: Frequent updates on deadlines and procedures (e.g. 2026 D.D.)
DGCOL platform for all applications
Importance of timely preliminary applications
